name: Chicken Stir-Fry with Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fresh mushrooms, thinly sliced (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
Remove chicken meat from bones and shred into 1-inch long pieces. You should have about 2 cups.
Cook pasta in boiling water until al dente, following package directions.
In a medium bowl, whisk together egg whites with 3 tablespoons cornstarch and garlic. Add the shredded chicken; toss to coat. Let stand for 5 minutes.
In another bowl, smooth the remaining 2 tablespoons cornstarch with some water. Stir in the remaining water, rice vinegar, soy sauce, and red pepper flakes. Set aside.
Heat oil in a large wok or heavy skillet over medium-high heat until it begins to sizzle. Lift chicken pieces from the egg mixture, letting excess drip back into the bowl. Stir-fry until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon onto paper towels and set aside. Wipe out the wok or skillet.
Return the wok to medium heat. Whisk the reserved cornstarch/soy sauce mixture again. Pour it into the wok and bring to a boil. Add mushrooms and onions, stirring constantly until the sauce thickens, about 3 minutes. Add the cooked chicken pieces and continue stirring until heated through and glistening.
Drain pasta and place on a serving platter. Top with the chicken/vegetable mixture.
